title: 10 medicinal preparations of Citrus × aurantium (bitter orange)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Citrus × aurantium teas is used to promote weight loss and improve digestion due to its high concentration of naringenin and hesperidin. It has been shown to boost metabolism, suppress appetite, and enhance fat burning. Additionally, the tea has anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases.

Citrus × aurantium tinctures is used to promote weight loss and improve circulation due to its high concentration of synephrine and other alkaloids. Additionally, it has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues such as bloating and indigestion, and may help reduce anxiety and stress levels by regulating the body's nervous system. The tincture can be taken internally or applied topically for skin issues like acne and eczema.

Citrus × aurantium decoctions is used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Its anti-inflammatory properties can help soothe digestive issues such as diarrhea, constipation, and bloating. Additionally, the decoction has been traditionally used to reduce anxiety and stress levels, improve sleep quality, and boost immune function. It is also believed to possess antioxidant and antiviral properties, making it a natural remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.

Citrus × aurantium ointments is used to treat a variety of health issues. The antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties make it effective in soothing skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns. It can also be used to reduce inflammation and relieve pain in muscles and joints. Additionally, the ointment has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues such as indigestion, bloating, and constipation due to its carminative properties.

Citrus × aurantium creams is used to promote overall wellness and alleviate various health concerns. The creams are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and limonoids, which have been shown to improve circulation, boost immunity, and reduce inflammation. Additionally, they may help with weight loss, skin issues such as acne and rosacea, and even provide relief from anxiety and depression. Overall, Citrus × aurantium creams offer a natural and holistic approach to maintaining healthy skin, hair, and overall well-being.

Citrus × aurantium gels is used to support weight loss and improve overall wellness. The gel's active compounds, such as synephrine and octopamine, have been shown to enhance metabolism and suppress appetite. Additionally, citrus aurantium gels may help alleviate symptoms of depression, anxiety, and insomnia due to its ability to stimulate the nervous system and promote relaxation.

Citrus × aurantium suppositories is used to alleviate symptoms of constipation and hemorrhoids. The essential oils present in the suppositories help to reduce inflammation and ease discomfort caused by these conditions. Additionally, they may also be used to treat mild urinary tract infections and vaginal yeast infections due to their antifungal and antibacterial properties.

Citrus × aurantium capsules is used to support weight loss and improve overall well-being. The capsules contain synephrine, a natural stimulant that can help increase metabolism and boost energy levels. Additionally, Citrus × aurantium has been traditionally used to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Its antioxidant properties may also help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body.

Citrus × aurantium tablets is used to promote weight loss and improve metabolism. Its active compound synephrine has been shown to increase fat burning and suppress appetite. Additionally, Citrus × aurantium tablets have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. It may also help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels when used in combination with other natural ingredients.

Citrus × aurantium syrups is used to alleviate various health issues. The syrup has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems such as constipation and diarrhea due to its natural laxative properties. It also helps in reducing anxiety and stress by promoting relaxation and calming the nervous system. Additionally, Citrus × aurantium syrups have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma.

intro: Citrus × aurantium has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils. These preparations are useful for a variety of purposes, including relieving digestive issues like constipation and indigestion, as well as reducing fever and inflammation. The tea is often used to calm nervousness and promote relaxation, while the essential oil is added to aromatherapy blends to uplift mood and reduce stress.
intro_desc: Citrus × aurantium has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils. These preparations are commonly used to alleviate digestive issues, including indigestion and bloating. The bitter compounds in Citrus × aurantium are also used to support liver and gallbladder health. Additionally, the plant's essential oil is used in aromatherapy to reduce anxiety and improve mood.
